name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question

---

## Question
Ask your question here. Be as specific as possible.

## Context
Provide any relevant context:
- What you're trying to do
- What you've already tried
- Any relevant configuration or environment details

## Research
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar questions
- [ ] I've read the documentation in README.md and docs/
- [ ] I've checked the CONTRIBUTING.md for relevant information

## Additional Information
Add any other information that might help answer your question.
